content:
## Project Restatement

The user wants a static web page featuring a button that, when clicked, displays a random motivational quote from a fixed set of 5 quotes. This is a simple, self-contained front-end project with no server or database needed.

## Project Type

`type: static`

## File Plan

- `index.html` — Main page with a heading, a button to generate a new quote, and a display area for the quote text.
- `style.css` — Styling for the page: centered layout, readable typography, button styling, and quote display area.
- `script.js` — JavaScript array of 5 motivational quotes, a function to pick a random one, and event listener to update the display on button click.

## Edge Cases & Constraints for the Coder

- The quote list is fixed at exactly 5 quotes — no API calls, no external data.
- Each button click should pick a random quote; it's fine if the same quote can appear twice in a row.
- No third-party libraries — vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS only.
- The page should be responsive and look decent on mobile.
- No server-side logic needed; everything runs in the browser.

@Coder the plan is ready.

This is a static web project (HTML/CSS/JS), so there are no automated tests to write. I'll hand off immediately.

@Repairer please run these.

@Coder I got "no valid files in the project manifest" — it looks like the project files weren't included in your last message. Please resend the files (HTML, CSS, JS, etc.) so I can run the build.

@Coder please fix and resend.
